info.name: ForeignLang API Collection
info.description:
Complete API documentation for the ForeignLang Platform.

**Base URL**: `http://localhost:8080`

**Authentication**: Most endpoints require session cookies (credentials: include) or Bearer JWT Token.

To authenticate:
1. POST /api/v1/auth/login → Copy the token from the response
2. Set the Bearer Token in the Collection Authorization tab
3. Or use OAuth2 Google/Facebook login via browser

item.name: 1. Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints (Register, Login, OAuth2, Profile Setup)

request.description: Returns JWT token + user object. Copy the token to Collection Variables → jwt_token.

item.name: 2. User Profile
item.description: User data, profile updates, password, credits, and transactions

request.description: Returns user profile + AI credit balance (usageRemaining, freeCredits, purchasedCredits, subscriptionCredits)
Replace :id with a valid topic UUID.

item.name: Get Vocabulary by Part of Speech
5. AI Features (Email Generator & Feedback)
item.description: AI-powered email generation and feedback (uses Gemini API or mock mode)

body.raw:
{
  "prompt": "Request a deadline extension for the sprint task FL-203",
  "tone": "professional",
  "language": "en",
  "emailType": "request",
  "recipientType": "manager"
}

request.description: Consumes 1 AI credit. Returns generated email subject + body.
Grants +1 free AI credit. Max 3 ads/day.

item.name: 6. Assessment & Gamification
item.description: Skill assessment, streak tracking, and leaderboards

request.description: Combines MCQ score (40%) + AI writing evaluation (60%).
Called by SePay payment gateway on successful VietQR payment.
